title: Burn It to the Ground
lyrics: So I'm not here conveying ideas, I have no sentiments, and can't control my feelings, can't trust them, for they will betray me, but maybe, just maybe, these words will somehow save me, or maybe, I'm just crazy. Do you know, it's cause I've been lying, what I've got, how, promise me that, what you look like will never be well, but I'm gone, I'm gone, that's how I'm feeling lately, yeah, no one wants me here, but I know I'm left alone, don't know which ways I'll go down, left or right, which one of these paths is right, where do I go tonight, too broken, tired, rage inspired, to rekindle my soul, fire, no I'm not a liar, what do you mean I'm fired, don't even remember being hired, 9 to 5, slave driven environment, it's a testament to the shit I spit, from the heart I'm coming with it, so you know that I mean it when I say I'll burn it down, burn it to the ground, yeah, yeah, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, yeah, yeah, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, ironically my residing space is not conducive to a healthy place, marred by past traces, painful soul, breaking veiled expectations, with unforeseen limitations, causing heart palpitations, no evasion's possible, the motion is unstoppable, began with no control, born without a soul, raised without morals, the idea is intolerable, hear the cries of my plea, I have to go soon, yeah, yeah, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, yeah, yeah, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, just remember the sound, yeah, yeah, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, remember the sound, as you burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, now there's no more sound, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground, burn it to the ground,
